# From Cradle to Grave

Figure 11.1 A Bahraini bride in traditional green thobe. She wears a circular gold plate (hama or taasa) on her head, with the chains of discs talaat suspended from the rim. Sweet basil (mishmun), jasmine, and rosebuds adorn her hair. Around her wrists she wears gold bangles, including the shmelat, studded with turquoise and pink glass. She wears a murtaʿasha choker and a long murtahish necklace ending in a crescent element.

72 Gubash and Lootah, Traditional Emirati Jewels, 62. central element.
